title: Apical Localization of RNA Polymerases Modulate Transcription Dynamics and Supercoiling Domains Revealed by Cryo-ET
author: Zhang, Meng
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supplementary materials include all particle raw tilts, 3D reconstructions, models, FSC evaluations, statistical data analyses, gel images, and oxDNA molecular dynamics simulations for the manuscript titled " Apical Localization of RNA Polymerases Modulate Transcription Dynamics and Supercoiling Domains Revealed by Cryo-ET ".
steps_raw: Supplementary materials include all particle raw tilts, 3D reconstructions, models, FSC evaluations, statistical data analyses, gel images, and oxDNA molecular dynamics simulations for the manuscript titled " Apical Localization of RNA Polymerases Modulate Transcription Dynamics and Supercoiling Domains Revealed by Cryo-ET ".
